name: SpacetimeDB Domain Slice Checks
summary: Review and test checks for changing a SpacetimeDB reducer/domain slice while preserving explicit domain/platform boundaries.

checks: Domain files for rich slices do not import `spacetimedb`.
Reducers follow authorize, load, domain call, save, record side effects.
Table access for aggregate state goes through repositories and indexed accessors.
Mapper and reconciliation tests cover row/domain round trips and child update plans when shapes change.
Run cargo fmt --check and cargo test when a Cargo module is present; run cargo check or spacetime build when feasible.

items.text: Business rules live in domain aggregate/service code or are explicitly platform-only authz/read concerns.
New or changed reducers do not hide domain behavior in transport/platform glue.
New table lookups have matching indexes or a documented bounded-scan reason.
Views are caller-scoped projections and do not replace reducer authorization.
Relevant domain, mapper, reconciliation, and reducer-adjacent tests were run or infeasibility was recorded.
